channel.title: Productivity on DotKsp Writings
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on DotKsp Writings

item.title: I Quit Social Media for 90 Days ; Here's What Nobody Tells You
item.description: I deleted every app for three months. I didn't find 'inner peace' immediately : I found something much more uncomfortable.

item.title: 17 Things Successful People Do Before 8AM (Backed by Research)
item.description: Success isn't an accident : it's a series of choices made before the world starts screaming for your attention.

item.title: The Morning Routine Nobody Talks About (That Actually Works)
item.description: Forget the 4 AM cold plunges and the 20-step skincare. This is the simple, contrarian routine that actually moves the needle.
